name: Polestar Automotive Holding UK PLC
description: Polestar Automotive Holding UK PLC is a Swedish-founded, design-led electric performance car brand headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden, while maintaining its legal domicile in the United Kingdom. The company specializes in the research, development, and commercialization of premium battery electric vehicles. Known for its commitment to sustainability, minimalistic Scandinavian design, and technological innovation, Polestar operates a global network of retail spaces and production facilities. The company is publicly traded on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol PSNY and focuses on accelerating the transition to sustainable electric mobility through its diverse lineup of electric performance vehicles.
